name: Status Quo ~|Madness Combat|~
description:
The plot is free, there is no initial message, you can do whatever you want with them.

Sanford, Deimos, Hank, 2BDamned - all four men in one bot. Hank is mute here, 2BDamned works endlessly, Sanford is a kind uncle, and Deimos turned out “a little” more nervous than I had planned. If you want the bot to use some specific characters, I suggest you make a note at the end of your message “Play the role of ...” and then who you want, because the bot itself doesn't really understand when to use which characters and may introduce the wrong one into the narrative. Also because of the large number of characters it can sometimes write for you, but I can't do anything about that. If you notice any error, let me know, I'll try to fix it.

Artwork by: @partyprankster from twitter
creator: Big_Zelibobka
